title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Wano Citizens, Toki, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Oden as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Following the sea breeze~

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: riding on the waves-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Far across the salty depths-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The Merry Evening Sun-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The circling birds sing in the sky..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Farewell to the harbour-

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: Wano Kuni - New World

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What?!?

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: Toki collapsed!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Toki is stable for now, but I'm going to be honest with you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She came down with a terrible fever and can't sail with us in this state. However, since she always planned to go to Wano anyway...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, she needs to get off at wano in order to follow the doctor's orders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that settles it. Now all that's left to is finding out what you should do, open.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're just going to ditch her with kin'emon, aren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Come on guys, I'm not that cruel!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Wait! Oden!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Don't you dare break your promise!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You swore to see that adventure to the end!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Lord Oden!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've protected Kuri in preparation for your return!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: PLEASE BECOME WANO'S RULER ONCE AGAIN!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Silence!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Haven't you considered Oden's feelings? He'd feel awful if his adventure ended because of me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: enough! I'll continue to travel!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I could tell my country had changed without

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even turning around to look. If turned around...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... I knew I would never again leave this island. It's like I couldn't stand to look at it with my own eyes

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: SCUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We got Wano's poneglyphs as fast as possible and left my country and beloved family behind.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Scum.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh come on, you can't read the poneglyphs!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 4 years later, a homecoming like this would not be waiting for me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even though the Vivre card points over here, I don't think we can land at Zou yet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Seriously, this isn't an island!!!

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Are you okay, Oden?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, it's just... this island gives off a different vibe.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Look! Pirates have come to visit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And they brought the Kozuki clan with them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hm, is this a letter of introduction from nekomamushi?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Duke Highughkan

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am so glad that both of them are stil alive and well!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't know how much turmoil your disappearance has caused!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Minkmanship for the Saviors!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Wait, what is this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Free Hugs!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GAH, something is not sitting well with me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you alright, open? You can always go back to the ship if you aren't.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I know exactly what you mean open...

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: You too Captain Roger!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: something is here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It feels like something "Huge" is being stored here!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 52 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
